descriptionByLocale.it: Fiorista (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. # Questo è ciò che si muove con noi Il Kulm Hotel è di fama mondiale per le sue magnifiche sale e meticolosa attenzione ai dettagli. Come la mano destra al nostro fiorista capo, si giocherà un ruolo chiave nel trasformare il nostro hotel in un capolavoro fiorente. Sei più di un fiorista – sei un ambasciatore di estetica ed eleganza. La vostra missione: Creative Staging: Prenderai un ruolo di primo piano nell'intero design floreale—dall'allestimento di tavoli delicati a grandi mazzi imponenti per le nostre suite più esclusive. Eventi: Mostra le tue competenze nel design floreale su larga scala durante matrimoni glamour, serate di gala e grandi progetti stagionali (come le nostre decorazioni natalizie e Capodanno). Perfezione in dettaglio: Si garantisce un aspetto costantemente impeccabile di tutti gli arrangiamenti e piante verdi, sia all'interno che all'esterno. Assumere la responsabilità: Sostiene il capo reparto in modo operativo, coordina le consegne di fiori, e assicurarsi che i nostri standard di alta qualità sono sentiti in ogni singolo accordo. Data di inizio: 1 giugno, 2026 # Lei è la Fondazione: Hai una formazione professionale completa come fiorista e esperienza professionale iniziale nel settore. Passione creativa: Hai un occhio affilato per colori, forme e tendenze attuali. Il vostro obiettivo è quello di creare un'atmosfera "migliorante" per i nostri ospiti internazionali. Composure: Anche durante eventi importanti e periodi ad alto volume, si lavora con precisione ed efficienza, mantenendo sempre un occhio per i minimi dettagli. Personalità: Il tuo aspetto è lucido come il tuo lavoro floreale. Sei un comunicatore proattivo all'interno del team e un punto di contatto caldo per i nostri ospiti. Lingue: Siete in grado di comunicare efficacemente in tedesco o in inglese. Perché il gruppo Kulm? Vi offriamo un palcoscenico per la vostra creatività in una delle posizioni più esclusive del mondo. Diventa parte di un team che valorizza la vera artigianalità, incoraggia l'iniziativa e prospera in una cultura del rispetto reciproco e dello spirito di squadra. Sei pronto a far fiorire il Kulm? Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la vostra applicazione! ## Benefits At Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è quello che ti muovi con noiCreating momenti di piscina perfetti: Garantisci operazioni fluide nella piscina e nella zona sauna mantenendo ogni dettaglio in vista. Un ospite a cuore: Con un sorriso caldo, accogliate i nostri ospiti e curateli attentamente in tutta la zona spa e piscina. Igiene al massimo livello: Mantenete la pulizia e l'ordine in tutto il centro benessere e fate controlli di qualità giornalieri. I momenti di benessere: Con le vostre competenze aggiuntive in infusioni di sauna, palestra acqua e lezioni di nuoto per i nostri ospiti più giovani, contribuite attivamente alla loro esperienza di relax e gioia in acqua. Questo è YouHolder del “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) con solida conoscenza di pronto soccorso. Esperienza nelle operazioni in piscina e competenze nella conduzione di infusioni di sauna, palestra acqua e lezioni di nuoto per i bambini. Eccellente tedesco e inglese competenze; lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio. Una personalità attenta e calorosa con un forte senso di servizio e quella speciale cosa che delizia gli ospiti. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Fiorista (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che si muove con noiRisponsabile per tutte le composizioni floreali nel nostro hotel, tra cui la creazione di pezzi centrali, mazzi di fiori, ecc. Decorare spazi pubblici non solo per uso quotidiano ma anche per occasioni speciali come feste, eventi di gala, funzioni private, ecc. Organizzazione e consulenza su paesaggi esterni Cura corretta di fiori e piante verdi Approvvigionamento di tutti i fiori, le piante e i materiali Sviluppo e implementazione del concetto, aderendo al bilancio specificato Questo è il tuo Hai completato con successo la formazione in fioristi e hanno diversi anni di esperienza (preferibilmente nel settore alberghiero) Con un tocco creativo, sai come deliziare i nostri ospiti con le tue decorazioni floreali e creare un'atmosfera impressionante e un'atmosfera unica dentro e fuori il nostro hotel di lusso Sei flessibile, apprezzi la buona comunicazione, e sono abituati a lavorare indipendentemente. Anche sotto pressione, si rimane composti e calmi, e si dispone di un demeanor naturale e amichevole verso gli ospiti e colleghi. Lingue: Inglese o Tedesco Vantaggi A Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Spa Therapist (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è quello che ti muovi con noiPamper i nostri ospiti con trattamenti termali professionali come massaggi sportivi, massaggi firma, scrub corpo, avvolge e bagni. Con il vostro senso per le esigenze individuali, si consiglia ai nostri ospiti sui servizi spa e prodotti per la cura della pelle di alta qualità. Fornire esperienze di benessere indimenticabili attraverso la cura di prima classe e il servizio attento. Sostenere il team spa alla reception con la pianificazione degli appuntamenti, assicurando operazioni fluide. Utilizza il tuo flair di vendita per consigliare i prodotti di assistenza domestica adatti, aumentando le entrate termiche. Assicurare i più elevati standard di igiene e sicurezza in tutto il centro benessere e fitness. Questa è la formazione completa come massaggiatore o una qualifica simile nel campo spa e benessere. Ulteriori certificazioni (ad esempio, massaggio tailandese, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, riflessologia, drenaggio linfatico) sono un vantaggio. Idealmente, esperienza in corsi di fitness come yoga o Pilates. Esperienza dimostrata nel settore spa, preferibilmente nell'ospitalità di lusso. Eccellente capacità di comunicazione in tedesco e inglese e una sensibilità ai desideri dei nostri ospiti. Flessibilità di lavorare fine settimana, vacanze e eventi speciali come il nostro Night Spa. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. descriptionByLocale.de: Florist (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Saisonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. oder Das ist, was Sie mit uns bewegen Das Kulm Hotel ist weltbekannt für seine herrlichen Hallen und sorgfältige Liebe zum Detail. Als rechte Hand zu unserem Head Florist spielen Sie eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Umwandlung unseres Hotels in ein blühendes Meisterwerk. Sie sind mehr als eine Floristin – Sie sind ein Botschafter von Ästhetik und Eleganz. Ihre Mission: Creative Staging: Sie werden eine führende Rolle in der gesamten floralen Design &mdash nehmen; von zarten Tisch-Anordnungen bis hin zu grandiosen, imposanten Sträußen für unsere exklusivsten Suiten. Veranstaltungshighlights: Zeigen Sie Ihre Fähigkeiten im großformatigen floralen Design bei glamourösen Hochzeiten, Galaabenden und großen saisonalen Projekten (wie unserer legendären Weihnachts- und Silvester-Dekoration). Perfektion im Detail: Sie sorgen für ein konsequent einwandfreies Aussehen aller Arrangements und Grünpflanzen, sowohl im Innen- als auch im Außenbereich. Verantwortung übernehmen: Sie unterstützen den Abteilungsleiter operativ, koordinieren Blumenlieferungen und stellen sicher, dass unsere hohen Qualitätsstandards in jeder einzelnen Anordnung gefühlt werden. Startdatum: 1. Juni, 2026 oder Hier sind Sie Stiftung: Sie haben eine abgeschlossene berufliche Ausbildung als Florist und erste Berufserfahrung auf dem Gebiet. Kreative Leidenschaft: Sie haben ein scharfes Auge für Farben, Formen und aktuelle Trends. Ihr Ziel ist es, eine "imposante Atmosphäre" für unsere internationalen Gäste zu schaffen. Abschluss: Auch bei großen Ereignissen und hochvolumigen Perioden arbeiten Sie präzise und effizient, halten immer ein Auge für das kleinste Detail. Persönlichkeit: Ihr Aussehen ist so poliert wie Ihr Blumenwerk. Sie sind ein proaktiver Kommunikator im Team und ein herzlicher Ansprechpartner für unsere Gäste. Sprachen: Sie können effektiv in Deutsch oder Englisch kommunizieren. Warum die Kulm-Gruppe? Wir bieten Ihnen eine Bühne für Ihre Kreativität in einer der exklusivsten Orte der Welt. Werden Sie Teil eines Teams, das wahre Handwerkskunst schätzt, Initiative fördert und in einer Kultur des gegenseitigen Respekts und des Teamgeistes gedeiht. Sind Sie bereit, die Kulm Blüte zu machen? Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung! Vorteile Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, erschwingliche Mahlzeiten im Personalrestaurant und zahlreiche Getränke. Bewerben Sie sich jetzt? Unsere dynamische und internationale Gemeinschaft bietet unseren Gästen smart Luxury für ein unnachahmliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels für unseren Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt zutiefst inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. descriptionByLocale.fr: Floriste (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonnelle / Saisonnier. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. - Oui. C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous L'Hôtel Kulm est mondialement reconnu pour ses magnifiques salles et son attention méticuleuse au détail. En tant que main droite à notre fleuriste de tête, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans la transformation de notre hôtel en un chef-d'œuvre fleuri. Vous êtes plus qu'un fleuriste – vous êtes un ambassadeur d'esthétique et d'élégance. Votre mission : Stagging créatif : Vous jouerez un rôle de premier plan dans l'ensemble de la décoration florale et mdash ; des arrangements de table délicats aux grands bouquets imposants pour nos suites les plus exclusives. Faits saillants de l'événement : Montrez vos compétences en design floral à grande échelle lors de mariages glamour, de soirées de gala et de grands projets saisonniers (comme nos légendaires décorations de Noël et du Nouvel An). Perfection en détail : Vous assurez une apparence toujours impeccable de toutes les dispositions et plantes vertes, à l'intérieur comme à l'extérieur. Prise de responsabilité : Vous soutenez le chef du département sur le plan opérationnel, coordonnez les livraisons de fleurs et veillez à ce que nos normes de qualité soient ressenties dans chaque arrangement. Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Oui. Voici la Fondation : Vous avez une formation professionnelle complète en tant que fleuriste et expérience professionnelle initiale dans le domaine. Passion créative : Vous avez un œil vif pour les couleurs, les formes et les tendances actuelles. Votre objectif est de créer une « atmosphère d'impression » pour nos invités internationaux. Composition: Même pendant les événements majeurs et les périodes de grand volume, vous travaillez avec précision et efficacité, en gardant toujours un œil pour les moindres détails. Personnalité : Votre apparence est aussi polie que votre travail floral. Vous êtes un communicateur proactif au sein de l'équipe et un point de contact chaleureux pour nos invités. Langues: Vous pouvez communiquer efficacement en allemand ou en anglais. Pourquoi le groupe Kulm ? Nous vous offrons une scène pour votre créativité dans l'un des endroits les plus exclusifs du monde. Devenez membre d'une équipe qui valorise l'artisanat, encourage l'initiative et prospère dans une culture de respect mutuel et d'esprit d'équipe. Êtes-vous prêt à faire fleurir le Kulm ? Nous sommes impatients de recevoir votre candidature! ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. Un hôte au cœur : Avec un sourire chaleureux, vous accueillez nos invités et les soignez attentivement tout au long du spa et de la piscine. Hygiène au plus haut niveau: Vous gardez la propreté et l'ordre tout au long du spa et effectuez des contrôles de qualité quotidiens. Les moments de bien-être : Grâce à vos compétences supplémentaires en infusions de sauna, en gym aqua et en cours de natation pour nos jeunes clients, vous contribuez activement à leur expérience de détente et de joie dans l'eau. Expérience dans les opérations de piscine ainsi que des compétences dans la conduite d'infusions sauna, aqua gym et des cours de natation pour les enfants. Avec votre sens pour les besoins individuels, vous conseillerez nos clients sur les services de spa et les produits de soins de haute qualité. Excellentes compétences en communication en allemand et en anglais et une sensibilité aux souhaits de nos invités. Flexibilité pour travailler les week-ends, les vacances et les événements spéciaux comme notre Night Spa. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01.

## This is what you move with us
In this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.
Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”
Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”
Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.
Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”
Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.
Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.
Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%).

## This is you
Foundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.
Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).
Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.
Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01.

## This is what you move with us
In this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.
Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”
Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”
Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.
Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”
Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.
Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.
Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%).

## This is you
Foundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.
Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).
Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.
Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

jobs.description:
Food and Beverage Director (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-01.

## This is what you move with us
Luxurious. Ambitious. Visionary. In this newly created key position, you will actively shape the culinary direction of our property as the strategic driving force behind our Food & Beverage concepts. In this role, you will design the future of our F&B world — visionary, bold, and with the ambition to take excellence to the next level. What makes this role unique:Leadership at eye level: You lead a team of seven experienced department heads and approximately 70 employees — with clarity, inspiration, and a genuine talent for developing people.
Concept architect & innovator: You evaluate existing concepts, develop new ideas, identify F&B trends and deliberately leverage them. You think on the next level and create experiences that excite our guests.
Strategy meets profitability: Budgeting, forecasting, margin optimization — your decisions are data-driven while always keeping the guest experience at the forefront.
Operational excellence: You establish quality standards, simplify processes, implement new tools, and modernize systems. For you, efficiency is a result of strong leadership.
Connector & multiplier: You act as a strategic partner to General Management, Culinary, Marketing, Sales, and Events — with foresight, professionalism, and outstanding communication skills.
Creating experiences rather than just planning them: From wine tastings and pop-up concepts to signature events — you curate memorable moments that stay with our guests long after their stay.

## This is you
Completed training in hospitality or gastronomy – ideally complemented by further education in management.
 Several years of leadership experience in the F&B department of a luxury hotel.
 Excellent command of German and English; Italian is an advantage.
 Entrepreneurial mindset, strong affinity with numbers, and a sharp sense for quality.
 Hands-on mentality, diplomatic skills, and a confident presence in every situation.
  Are you ready to set new culinary standards and work with a passionate team at the highest level? Then we look forward to receiving your application.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Food and Beverage Director (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-01.

## This is what you move with us
Luxurious. Ambitious. Visionary. In this newly created key position, you will actively shape the culinary direction of our property as the strategic driving force behind our Food & Beverage concepts. In this role, you will design the future of our F&B world — visionary, bold, and with the ambition to take excellence to the next level. What makes this role unique:Leadership at eye level: You lead a team of seven experienced department heads and approximately 70 employees — with clarity, inspiration, and a genuine talent for developing people.
Concept architect & innovator: You evaluate existing concepts, develop new ideas, identify F&B trends and deliberately leverage them. You think on the next level and create experiences that excite our guests.
Strategy meets profitability: Budgeting, forecasting, margin optimization — your decisions are data-driven while always keeping the guest experience at the forefront.
Operational excellence: You establish quality standards, simplify processes, implement new tools, and modernize systems. For you, efficiency is a result of strong leadership.
Connector & multiplier: You act as a strategic partner to General Management, Culinary, Marketing, Sales, and Events — with foresight, professionalism, and outstanding communication skills.
Creating experiences rather than just planning them: From wine tastings and pop-up concepts to signature events — you curate memorable moments that stay with our guests long after their stay.

## This is you
Completed training in hospitality or gastronomy – ideally complemented by further education in management.
 Several years of leadership experience in the F&B department of a luxury hotel.
 Excellent command of German and English; Italian is an advantage.
 Entrepreneurial mindset, strong affinity with numbers, and a sharp sense for quality.
 Hands-on mentality, diplomatic skills, and a confident presence in every situation.
  Are you ready to set new culinary standards and work with a passionate team at the highest level? Then we look forward to receiving your application.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

jobs.title: Front Office Agent (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Front Office Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
As a Front Office Agent, you are often the first and last point of contact for our international guests. In this role, you combine genuine warmth with the precision of 5-star hospitality, turning every stay into an unforgettable experience.Your Responsibilities:The First Impression: Heartfelt check-in & check-out, professional rooming, and competent guest support throughout their entire stay.
Service Excellence: Active contribution to a smooth daily front office operation according to the high standards of "The Leading Hotels of the World" (LHW).
Coordination: Handling and processing reservations via Protel, as well as reliable cash management.
Communication: Confident handling of guest inquiries and complaint management with tact and diplomacy.

## This is you
Foundation: Completed vocational training in the hotel industry and (initial) professional experience at the front office of a luxury or upscale hotel.
Languages: Fluent in German and English. Additional languages are a welcome asset.
IT Skills: Proficient in using Opera Cloud and MS Office.
Personality: You stand out through your well-groomed appearance, a resilient nature, and a genuine passion for the art of service.
Why the Kulm? We offer you a workplace in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Look forward to a motivated team, attractive benefits within the Kulm Group, and the opportunity to gain valuable experience in a tradition-rich environment.Ready for the Kulm Spirit? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.
This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Driver  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Front Office Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
As a Front Office Agent, you are often the first and last point of contact for our international guests. In this role, you combine genuine warmth with the precision of 5-star hospitality, turning every stay into an unforgettable experience.Your Responsibilities:The First Impression: Heartfelt check-in & check-out, professional rooming, and competent guest support throughout their entire stay.
Service Excellence: Active contribution to a smooth daily front office operation according to the high standards of "The Leading Hotels of the World" (LHW).
Coordination: Handling and processing reservations via Protel, as well as reliable cash management.
Communication: Confident handling of guest inquiries and complaint management with tact and diplomacy.

## This is you
Foundation: Completed vocational training in the hotel industry and (initial) professional experience at the front office of a luxury or upscale hotel.
Languages: Fluent in German and English. Additional languages are a welcome asset.
IT Skills: Proficient in using Opera Cloud and MS Office.
Personality: You stand out through your well-groomed appearance, a resilient nature, and a genuine passion for the art of service.
Why the Kulm? We offer you a workplace in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. jobs.title: Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
At the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.
Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.
Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.
Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.
Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.

## This is you
Organizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.
Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.
Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.
Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.
Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

descriptionByLocale.it:
Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
At the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.
Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.
Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.
Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.
Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.

## This is you
Organizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.
Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.
Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.
Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.
Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

jobs.title: Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Maître de Rang (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01.

## This is what you move with us
You confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.
You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.
You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.
You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.
You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.
You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.

## This is you
A completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.
Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.
Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.
Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.
Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.
Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.
Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. jobs.title: Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-10-01.

## This is what you move with us
Front Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.
Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.
Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.
Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.
Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.

## This is you
Experience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.
Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.
Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.
Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.

Kulm Hotel

This is what you move with usHandling Guest Inquiries: You respond to written and telephone inquiries in a professional and service-oriented manner, working in close coordination with the Concierge Team. Administrative Support: You assist the Concierge Team in daily operations by reliably managing administrative tasks and scheduling. Data Management & Documentation: You maintain guest information and internal overviews, ensuring accurate and well-organized documentation of relevant data. Process Optimization: You identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement minor automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate or Zapier. Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team. Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering.
This is youA structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus. A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications. A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-10-01.

## This is what you move with us
Front Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.
Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.
Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.
Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.
Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.

## This is you
Experience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.
Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.
Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.
Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. jobs.title: Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-10.

## This is what you move with us
Cleanliness and Organization: You will ensure impeccable cleanliness and order in our high-end kitchen and the restaurant's back office.
Careful Handling: You will be responsible for the precise handling, cleaning, and storage of porcelain, silverware, glassware, and blackware.
Coordination and Organization: Ensure smooth operations through efficient organization and coordination of daily tasks.
Start: immediate

## This is you
Hospitality Experience: You bring solid experience from the hospitality industry, ideally in a high-demand environment.
Language Skills: German or English or Italian
Flexibility and Team Spirit: Your ability to adapt to changing requirements and work effectively within a dynamic team is a key strength.
Start: per immediate wanted, until ca. 06.04.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours.
This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usDo you thrive on crystal-clear processes, impeccable hygiene, and teamwork at a 5-star superior level? Become the driving force behind our culinary experiences and ensure flawless operations in the back-of-house. Your Responsibilities:  Shift & Duty Planning across multiple outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, external events) – you orchestrate seamless operations from mise-en-place to breakdown. Leadership & Coaching of the Stewarding Team: daily briefings, clear standards, motivating presence – and when the pressure is on, you lead by working hands-on. Hygiene & Quality Assurance at the highest level (HACCP-compliant): inspections, documentation, and training to guarantee spotless standards. Dishwashing & Equipment Management: efficient use of modern facilities, care and maintenance, acting as a key link between kitchen, service, and events. Inventory & Cost Control: keeping track of stock, chemicals, and consumables; ensuring efficient processes without downtime. Event Excellence: logistics for large-scale functions, setting up return stations, and managing swift turnarounds.
This is youExperience in luxury hospitality/catering within Stewarding or Back-of-House – ideally in a supervisory or assistant managerial role. Practical mindset & overview: you make smart decisions, remain calm in peak times, and take ownership. Leadership & communication skills. Hands-on mentality: proactive, solution-oriented, and a role model for cleanliness, order, and efficiency. Solid knowledge of hygiene & technology: HACCP expertise, familiarity with cleaning technology, and confidence with planning/office tools. Flexibility: willingness to work shifts, weekends, and support events – you enjoy the pulse of a lively luxury property. Languages: Portuguese or Italian as well as English.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%

descriptionByLocale.it: Ufficio Dipendente - Steward (start immediatamente) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-10. # Siamo alla ricerca di un supporto energetico per il nostro moderno ristorante personale, Capricorn, che è stato costruito poco meno di un anno fa. Sei il cuore delle nostre operazioni dietro le quinte, assicurando non solo la pulizia impeccabile, ma anche sostenere attivamente il nostro team di cucina con preparazioni culinarie. I vostri compiti: cucina Supporto: Si assiste attivamente con il lavoro di preparazione (mise-en-place), come il taglio professionale di verdure e altri compiti preparatori. Ordine e pulizia: Assicurate una pulizia impeccabile e l'organizzazione nella nostra cucina moderna, così come nell'ufficio posteriore del ristorante Capricorn. Attenzione: Siete responsabili per la pulizia, la cura e lo stoccaggio preciso di porcellana, vetreria, posate e utensili da cucina (pot e pentole). Coordinamento e Organizzazione: Si lavora a stretto contatto con i team di cucina e servizio per garantire operazioni fluide — anche durante ore di punta occupato. # Questa è l'esperienza professionale: Porti una solida esperienza nel settore della gastronomia, idealmente da un ambiente hotel a 4 o 5 stelle. Interessi nelle arti culinarie: Vi piace la gestione di ingredienti freschi e sono felici di sostenere il team con la preparazione di cibo. Competenze linguistiche: Si comunica con fiducia in tedesco, inglese o italiano. Personalità: Sei caratterizzato da flessibilità e la capacità di lavorare bene in un team. Apprezzi un ambiente dinamico e goditi il lavoro in un team motivato. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo.
