descriptionByLocale.de: Büroangestellter - Steward (sofortiger Einstieg) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-10. ## Das bewegt dich bei uns Wir suchen engagierte Unterstützung für unser modernes Mitarbeitermenü, Capricorn, das vor weniger als einem Jahr neu gebaut wurde. Du bist das Herz unserer Abläufe im Hintergrund, sorgst nicht nur für makellose Sauberkeit, sondern unterstützt auch aktiv unser Küchenteam bei kulinarischen Vorbereitungen. Deine Aufgaben: Küchenunterstützung: Du hilfst aktiv bei Vorbereitungsarbeiten (Mise-en-Place), z.B. beim professionellen Schneiden von Gemüse und anderen Vorbereitungsaufgaben. Bestellung und Sauberkeit: Du stellst eine einwandfreie Sauberkeit und Organisation in unserer modernen Küche sowie im Backoffice des Capricorn-Restaurants sicher. Sorgfältiger Umgang: Du bist verantwortlich für die präzise Reinigung, Pflege und Lagerung von Porzellan, Glaswaren, Besteck und Küchenutensilien (Töpfe und Pfannen). Koordination und Organisation: Du arbeitest eng mit den Küchen- und Serviceteams zusammen, um einen reibungslosen Ablauf – auch während der Stoßzeiten – zu gewährleisten. ## Das bist du Berufserfahrung: Du bringst solide Erfahrung aus der Gastronomie mit, idealerweise aus einem 4- oder 5-Sterne-Hotelumfeld. Interesse an Kulinarik: Du magst den Umgang mit frischen Zutaten und unterstützt das Team gerne bei der Zubereitung. Sprachkenntnisse: Du kommunizierst sicher in Deutsch, Englisch oder Italienisch. Persönlichkeit: Du zeichnest dich durch Flexibilität und Teamfähigkeit aus. Du schätzt ein dynamisches Umfeld und arbeitest gerne in einem motivierten Team. ## Vorteile Beim Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeitenden das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Mahlzeiten im Mitarbeitermenü und zahlreiche Extras. descriptionByLocale.fr: Employé de Bureau - Steward (démarrage immédiat) (h/f/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadine, Grisons). Temps plein : 100%. Contrat : Saisonnier. Date de début : 2026-02-10. ## Voici ce que vous faites avec nous Nous recherchons un soutien énergique pour notre restaurant moderne pour le personnel, Capricorn, qui a été construit il y a moins d’un an. Vous êtes le cœur de nos opérations en coulisses, assurant non seulement une propreté impeccable mais aussi soutenant activement notre équipe de cuisine dans les préparations culinaires. Vos tâches : Support en cuisine : vous assistez activement lors des travaux de préparation (mise-en-place), comme la découpe professionnelle de légumes et autres tâches préparatoires. Commande et Propreté : vous garantissez une propreté et une organisation parfaites dans notre cuisine moderne ainsi que dans le bureau du restaurant Capricorn. Manipulation soignée : vous êtes responsable du nettoyage précis, de l’entretien et du stockage de la porcelaine, de la verrerie, des couverts et des ustensiles de cuisine (casseroles et poêles). Coordination et Organisation : vous travaillez en étroite collaboration avec les équipes de cuisine et de service pour assurer un fonctionnement fluide — même lors des heures de pointe. ## Voici qui vous êtes Expérience professionnelle : vous apportez une solide expérience dans le secteur de la gastronomie, idéalement dans un environnement hôtelier 4 ou 5 étoiles. Intérêt pour la gastronomie : vous aimez manipuler des ingrédients frais et êtes heureux de soutenir l’équipe dans la préparation des plats. Compétences linguistiques : vous communiquez avec confiance en allemand, anglais ou italien. Personnalité : vous êtes caractérisé par votre flexibilité et votre capacité à travailler en équipe. Vous appréciez un environnement dynamique et aimez travailler dans une équipe motivée. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, des hébergements confortables, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. Postulez maintenant ## Superviseur Stewarding (h/f/d) Kulm Hotel 100% Les personnes à 1800 m d’altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos invités un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inégalée. En tant que membre du groupe de luxe Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et ainsi, nous incarnons notre culture : luxe discret, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, faisons en sorte que cela se réalise. Voici votre chance de faire partie de notre culture qui façonne : Voici ce que vous faites avec nous Vous aimez les processus clairs, une hygiène impeccable et le travail d’équipe à un niveau supérieur 5 étoiles ? Devenez la force motrice derrière nos expériences culinaires et assurez un fonctionnement sans faille en coulisses. Vos responsabilités : Planification des shifts et des services dans plusieurs points de vente (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, événements externes) — orchestrant des opérations fluides du mise-en-place au démontage. Leadership & Coaching de l’équipe Stewarding : briefings quotidiens, standards clairs, présence motivante — et lorsque la pression monte, vous menez en étant pratique. Hygiène & Assurance Qualité (conformité HACCP) : inspections, documentation et formations pour garantir des standards irréprochables. Lavage de vaisselle & gestion des équipements : utilisation efficace des installations modernes, entretien et maintenance, en tant que lien clé entre cuisine, service et événements. Contrôle des stocks & des coûts : suivi des stocks, produits chimiques et consommables ; assurer des processus efficaces sans temps morts. Excellence lors d’événements : logistique pour les grandes fonctions, mise en place de stations de retour, gestion des rotations rapides. ## Voici qui vous êtes Expérience dans l’hôtellerie de luxe / catering en Stewarding ou Back-of-House — idéalement en rôle de supervision ou d’assistant manager. Mentalité pratique & vision d’ensemble : vous prenez des décisions intelligentes, restez calme lors des pics d’activité et assumez la responsabilité. Compétences en leadership & communication. Mentalité pratique : proactif, orienté solutions, et modèle de propreté, d’ordre et d’efficacité. Solide connaissance de l’hygiène & technologie : expertise HACCP, familiarité avec les technologies de nettoyage et outils de planification/bureau. Flexibilité : disponibilité pour travailler en shifts, weekends et soutenir des événements — vous aimez le rythme d’une propriété de luxe vivante. Langues : portugais ou italien ainsi que anglais. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, des hébergements confortables, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Creating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.
A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.
Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.
Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.

## This is you
Holder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.
Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.
Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.
An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.

At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.description:
Porter Tournant (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Transporting guest luggage during arrival and departure
Cleaning rooms and suites as well as public areas
Performing errands and snow removal in winter
Careful handling and maintenance of machines and equipment
Supporting floor porters and participating in housekeeping meetings and training sessions

## This is you
Professional experience in a similar position in luxury hotels
Reliability and discretion
Passion for service and enjoyment of teamwork
Must have: good German or English skills, ideally additional languages
Well-groomed appearance

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    50%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usAt the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.
This is youOrganizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.

This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.title: Reservations Agent  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Reservations Agent  (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01.

## This is what you move with us
Competently handle reservations for individual and group guests as the first point of contact, ensuring the highest level of professionalism and proactive attention to detail 
  Maintain and update guest databases with the utmost accuracy, contributing significantly to guest satisfaction and loyalty 
  Address and resolve guest complaints promptly and with sensitivity, always finding the most suitable solution in a discreet and efficient manner 
  Manage multichannel communication, responding to all incoming enquiries by phone and email 
  Coordinate with other departments to ensure optimal alignment between room and event occupancy and our F&B and Spa offerings 
  Support the Reservations Manager with administrative tasks, ensure adherence to our high standards, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our products

## This is you
Charisma and friendliness with a natural warmth and refined manners, combined with a keen sense for the needs of discerning guests 
  Team spirit and flexibility, with excellent communication skills and the ability to adapt in a dynamic work environment 
  Experience in luxury hospitality, with completed vocational training and at least two years of experience in a 5-star hotel in Front Office or Reservations 
  Strong language skills in German and English (written and spoken); additional languages such as Italian are an advantage 
  Technical proficiency in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook, as well as experience managing online booking channels 
  Exceptional organisational skills and customer focus, ensuring precise planning, discreet guest relations, and outstanding service delivery

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Grand Hotel Kronenhof

And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Agente di prenotazione (m/l/g) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadina, Grigioni). Penale: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanente. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01. ## Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Gestire con competenza le prenotazioni per ospiti individuali e di gruppo come primo punto di contatto, garantendo il massimo livello di professionalità e attenzione proattiva ai dettagli Mantenere e aggiornare i database degli ospiti con la massima accuratezza, contribuendo in modo significativo alla soddisfazione e alla fedeltà degli ospiti Affrontare e risolvere i reclami degli ospiti tempestivamente e con sensibilità, trovando sempre la soluzione più adatta in modo discreto ed efficiente Gestire la comunicazione multicanale, rispondendo a tutte le richieste in arrivo tramite telefono ed e-mail Coordinarsi con gli altri dipartimenti per garantire l'allineamento ottimale tra l'occupazione delle camere e dell'evento e il nostro Offerte F&B e Spa Supportare il responsabile delle prenotazioni con compiti amministrativi, garantire il rispetto dei nostri standard elevati e contribuire al miglioramento continuo dei nostri prodotti ## Questo sei tu Carisma e cordialità con un calore naturale e modi raffinati, combinati con uno spiccato senso per le esigenze degli ospiti più esigenti Spirito di squadra e flessibilità, con eccellenti capacità di comunicazione e capacità di adattarsi in un ambiente di lavoro dinamico Esperienza nell'ospitalità di lusso, con formazione professionale completa e almeno due anni di esperienza in un hotel a 5 stelle nel front office o nelle prenotazioni Forti competenze linguistiche in Tedesco e inglese (scritto e parlato); lingue aggiuntive come l'italiano sono un vantaggio Competenza tecnica in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel e Outlook, nonché esperienza nella gestione di canali di prenotazione online Eccezionali capacità organizzative e attenzione al cliente, garantendo una pianificazione precisa, relazioni discrete con gli ospiti e fornitura di servizi eccezionale ## Vantaggi In Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. Candidati ora ## Assistente responsabile prenotazioni (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno dando forma al Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti lusso intelligente per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tali, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione ed esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura di modellamento: questo è ciò che ti muovi con noiSei la voce del nostro hotel: sia per telefono che per e-mail, crei offerte irresistibili, confermi le prenotazioni e garantisci che i follow-up siano gestiti con precisione, il tutto in linea con gli standard LHW e ISO. Pensi in termini di occupazione e opportunità: mantieni il nostro piano di prenotazioni accurato e aggiornato, contribuendo attivamente all'utilizzo ottimale del nostro inventario delle camere. Dai vita ai numeri: in stretta collaborazione con l'Executive Assistant Manager e il Front Office Manager, sviluppi previsioni e report essenziali per la pianificazione quotidiana. Sei meticoloso con i dati: i profili degli ospiti e i database sono gestiti con cura e discrezione: struttura e conformità fanno parte del tuo DNA. Sei al passo con i tempi: dalla gestione del sistema Channel Manager al perfezionamento continuo dei nostri standard ISO e RIMS, garantisci operazioni fluide e porti nuove idee sul tavolo. Trasformi il potenziale in prestazioni: l'upselling è più di un compito per te: è un modo per migliorare il viaggio degli ospiti e creare un valore aggiunto significativo. Perché unirsi a noi? Perché farai parte di uno degli hotel più rinomati della Svizzera: un luogo in cui non solo lavori, ma contribuisci a plasmare il futuro. Sarai circondato da professionisti appassionati e sperimenterai una cultura di squadra definita da eleganza, autenticità e collaborazione. Questo sei tu Background professionale: hai completato la formazione professionale nel settore dell'ospitalità o in un settore commerciale - idealmente nell'ambito dell'ospitalità di lusso - e offri diversi anni di esperienza rilevante. Mentalità di vendita: comprendi cosa guida le decisioni di prenotazione e come migliorare l'esperienza degli ospiti attraverso la vendita strategica delle camere. Competenze linguistiche: Parli e scrivi fluentemente in tedesco e inglese; la conoscenza aggiuntiva del francese o dell'italiano costituisce un vantaggio. Compostezza e chiarezza: sia sotto pressione che nella comunicazione diretta con l'ospite, rimani professionale, efficiente e cordiale. Spinta e orientamento alla crescita: sei desideroso non solo di soddisfare le aspettative, ma di migliorare i processi e investire nel tuo sviluppo. Vantaggi Nel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno dando forma al Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti lusso intelligente per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tali, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione ed esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura di modellamento: questo è ciò che ti muovi con noiFront Office e ospiti: gestire check-in posticipati e check-out anticipati, fornire assistenza professionale agli ospiti via telefono e soddisfare richieste speciali degli ospiti.Servizio parcheggiatore e bagagli: parcheggio dei veicoli degli ospiti nel garage e assistenza con il servizio bagagli e il rooming.Audit notturno: completamento della chiusura giornaliera nel sistema (Opera Cloud), controllo dei report dei punti vendita e gestione della gestione fisica del contante per il reparto contabilità.Sicurezza e Controllo: conduzione di controlli di sicurezza regolari, monitoraggio del pannello di allarme antincendio e garanzia di pace e tranquillità notturna in tutti i locali. Preparazione: generazione di rapporti di dipartimento, acquisto e pubblicazione di giornali e fornitura di servizi di lustrascarpe per i nostri ospiti. Questo sei tuEsperienza: un solido background nel settore alberghiero (preferibilmente nel segmento a 5 stelle) e idealmente una precedente esperienza nei turni di notte.Competenza IT: gestione sicura dei sistemi PMS (Opera Cloud) e delle applicazioni standard di MS Office.Lingue: fluente tedesco e inglese; la conoscenza dell'italiano è un vantaggio significativo grazie alla nostra posizione e alla nostra clientela. Impegno: patente di guida valida e idoneità fisica richiesta per i controlli di sicurezza e la gestione dei bagagli. Personalità: un alto senso di responsabilità, assoluta discrezione e un aspetto raffinato che soddisfa i nostri standard di lusso. Vantaggi Nel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra shaping culture: questo è ciò che ti muovi con noiCalda accoglienza per i nostri ospiti: con la tua naturale cordialità e carisma, fai sentire ogni ospite a casa fin dal primo momento.Pacheggiatore: parcheggi i veicoli dei nostri ospiti nel garage sotterraneo e gestisci la logistica del garage, sempre con attenzione ai dettagli e all'ordine.Trasferimenti ospiti: che si tratti dallo skilift o al ristorante, gestisci i trasferimenti degli ospiti con la navetta dell'hotel, garantendo un viaggio sicuro e piacevole.Servizi per gli ospiti: carico/scarico dei bagagli degli ospiti e gestione di piccole commissioni secondo necessità. Questo sei tuCordialità naturale e carisma: puoi quasi anticipare le esigenze dei nostri ospiti esigenti e fare ogni sforzo per garantire che il loro soggiorno sia il più piacevole possibile.Aspetto curato e buone maniere: Rappresenti il nostro hotel con stile, impressionando con cortesia professionale e un comportamento elegante.Spirito di squadra e flessibilità: ti piace lavorare in un team dinamico, adattandoti rapidamente alle diverse esigenze, sempre con un sorriso.Patente di guida valida: Naturalmente, hai una patente di guida valida e sentirti a tuo agio nelle manovre in parcheggi stretti e sulla strada. Competenze linguistiche: idealmente parli tedesco e inglese, con lingue aggiuntive (in particolare italiano) che rappresentano un gradito vantaggio. descriptionByLocale.de: Reservierungsagent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100 %. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Unbefristet. Stellenantritt: 01.04.2026. ## Das ist es, was Sie mit uns bewegen. Als erster Ansprechpartner kümmern Sie sich kompetent um Reservierungen für Einzel- und Gruppengäste und stellen dabei ein Höchstmaß an Professionalität und proaktive Liebe zum Detail sicher. Pflegen und aktualisieren Sie Gästedatenbanken mit höchster Genauigkeit und tragen so wesentlich zur Gästezufriedenheit und -treue bei. Behandeln und lösen Sie Gästebeschwerden zeitnah und mit Einfühlungsvermögen und finden Sie immer die am besten geeignete Lösung auf diskrete und effiziente Weise. Verwalten Sie die Multichannel-Kommunikation und beantworten Sie alle eingehenden Anfragen per Telefon und E-Mail. Koordinieren Sie sich mit anderen Abteilungen, um eine optimale Abstimmung zwischen Zimmer und Zimmer zu gewährleisten Eventbelegung und unser F&B- und Spa-Angebot Unterstützen Sie den Reservierungsmanager bei administrativen Aufgaben, stellen Sie die Einhaltung unserer hohen Standards sicher und tragen Sie zur kontinuierlichen Verbesserung unserer Produkte bei ## Das sind Sie Charisma und Freundlichkeit mit natürlicher Herzlichkeit und gepflegten Umgangsformen, gepaart mit einem ausgeprägten Gespür für die Bedürfnisse anspruchsvoller Gäste Teamgeist und Flexibilität, mit ausgezeichneten Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und der Fähigkeit, sich in einem dynamischen Arbeitsumfeld anzupassen Erfahrung in der Luxusgastronomie, mit abgeschlossener Berufsausbildung und mindestens zwei Jahren Erfahrung in einem 5-Sterne-Hotel Hotel im Front Office oder in der Reservierung. Gute Sprachkenntnisse in Deutsch und Englisch (schriftlich und mündlich); Weitere Sprachen wie Italienisch sind von Vorteil. Technische Kenntnisse in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel und Outlook sowie Erfahrung in der Verwaltung von Online-Buchungskanälen. Außergewöhnliche organisatorische Fähigkeiten und Kundenorientierung, die eine präzise Planung, diskrete Gästebeziehungen und eine hervorragende Servicebereitstellung gewährleisten. ## Vorteile Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen. Jetzt bewerben ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100 % Menschen auf 1800 m Seehöhe prägen das Luxus-Bergreisen. jobs.title: Service Employee Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Service Employee Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
True hospitality at eye level: our new staff restaurant will be your domain – a place where colleagues are made to feel like valued guests.
Full responsibility for delivering first-class, seamless service – from daily mise en place to the final touch at the buffet.
More than just routine: together with the kitchen team, you’ll create thoughtful offerings and little moments of well-being during the workday.
A role model for quality and care – you serve as the empathetic bridge between our team members and outstanding service.
Not just following, but shaping: your ideas and initiative will actively help evolve our internal hospitality culture.

## This is you
Completed vocational training in service, ideally some experience in 5-star hospitality.
A strong sense of quality, passion for hospitality, and an eye for detail – and the ability to connect with people.
Resilient, independent, and team-oriented with a hands-on mindset.
Composed and professional – even when the pressure’s on.
languages: Italian plus English or German
Willingness to work weekends and holidays – always with a smile, for the people who make it all happen.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!

Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.

jobs.title: Spa Therapist (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Spa Therapist (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-11-15.

## This is what you move with us
Pamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.
With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.
Provide unforgettable well-being experiences through first-class care and attentive service.
Support the spa team at the reception with appointment scheduling, ensuring smooth operations.
Use your sales flair to recommend suitable home care products, boosting spa revenue.
Ensure the highest hygiene and safety standards throughout the spa and fitness area.

## This is you
Completed training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.
Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.
Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.
Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.
Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.

Pamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.

jobs.description:
Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Do you thrive on crystal-clear processes, impeccable hygiene, and teamwork at a 5-star superior level? Become the driving force behind our culinary experiences and ensure flawless operations in the back-of-house. Your Responsibilities:  Shift & Duty Planning across multiple outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, external events) – you orchestrate seamless operations from mise-en-place to breakdown.
 Leadership & Coaching of the Stewarding Team: daily briefings, clear standards, motivating presence – and when the pressure is on, you lead by working hands-on.
 Hygiene & Quality Assurance at the highest level (HACCP-compliant): inspections, documentation, and training to guarantee spotless standards.
 Dishwashing & Equipment Management: efficient use of modern facilities, care and maintenance, acting as a key link between kitchen, service, and events.
 Inventory & Cost Control: keeping track of stock, chemicals, and consumables; ensuring efficient processes without downtime.
 Event Excellence: logistics for large-scale functions, setting up return stations, and managing swift turnarounds.

## This is you
Experience in luxury hospitality/catering within Stewarding or Back-of-House – ideally in a supervisory or assistant managerial role.
 Practical mindset & overview: you make smart decisions, remain calm in peak times, and take ownership.
 Leadership & communication skills.
 Hands-on mentality: proactive, solution-oriented, and a role model for cleanliness, order, and efficiency.
 Solid knowledge of hygiene & technology: HACCP expertise, familiarity with cleaning technology, and confidence with planning/office tools.
 Flexibility: willingness to work shifts, weekends, and support events – you enjoy the pulse of a lively luxury property.
 Languages: Portuguese or Italian as well as English.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.

descriptionByLocale.it: Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadina, Grigioni). Penale: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Stagionale. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. ## Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Ti affidi a processi cristallini, igiene impeccabile e lavoro di squadra a un livello superiore a 5 stelle? Diventa la forza trainante delle nostre esperienze culinarie e garantisci operazioni impeccabili nel back-of-house. Le tue responsabilità: pianificazione di turni e turni su più punti vendita (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, servizio in camera, banchetti, eventi esterni): orchestra operazioni senza interruzioni dalla mise-en-place al guasto. Leadership e coaching del team di steward: briefing giornalieri, standard chiari, presenza motivante - e quando la pressione è alta, guidi lavorando sul campo. Igiene e garanzia di qualità al massimo livello (conformità HACCP): ispezioni, documentazione e formazione per garantire standard impeccabili. Dishwashing & Equipment Management: uso efficiente di strutture moderne, cura e manutenzione, fungendo da collegamento chiave tra cucina, servizio ed eventi. Controllo delle scorte e dei costi: tenere traccia delle scorte, dei prodotti chimici e dei materiali di consumo; garantire processi efficienti senza tempi di inattività. Event Excellence: logistica per eventi su larga scala, allestimento di stazioni di restituzione e gestione di turnaround rapidi. ## Questa è la tua esperienza nell'ospitalità/ristorazione di lusso all'interno dello stewarding o del back-of-house, idealmente in un ruolo di supervisione o assistente manageriale. Mentalità pratica e panoramica: prendi decisioni intelligenti, mantieni la calma nelle ore di punta e ti assumi la responsabilità. Capacità di leadership e comunicazione. Mentalità pratica: proattivo, orientato alla soluzione e un modello di pulizia, ordine ed efficienza. Solida conoscenza di igiene e tecnologia: competenza HACCP, familiarità con la tecnologia di pulizia e sicurezza con gli strumenti di pianificazione/ufficio. Flessibilità: disponibilità a lavorare su turni, nei fine settimana e ad eventi di supporto: ti piace il ritmo di una vivace proprietà di lusso. Lingue: portoghese o italiano oltre all'inglese. ## Vantaggi Nel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. Candidati ora ## Impiegato d'ufficio - Steward (inizia immediatamente) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno dando forma al Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti lusso intelligente per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tali, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione ed esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura dello shaping: questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi. Cerchiamo un supporto energico per il nostro moderno ristorante per il personale, Capricorn, che è stato costruito poco meno di un anno fa. Tu sei il cuore delle nostre operazioni dietro le quinte, garantendo non solo una pulizia impeccabile ma anche supportando attivamente il nostro team di cucina nelle preparazioni culinarie. I tuoi compiti: Supporto in cucina: assisti attivamente nei lavori di preparazione (mise-en-place), come il taglio professionale delle verdure e altri compiti preparatori. Ordine e pulizia: garantisci pulizia e organizzazione impeccabili nella nostra cucina moderna e nel back office del ristorante Capricorn. Gestione attenta: sei responsabile della pulizia, della cura e della conservazione precise dei prodotti porcellane, bicchieri, posate e utensili da cucina (pentole e padelle). Coordinamento e organizzazione: lavori a stretto contatto con i team di cucina e di servizio per garantire operazioni senza intoppi, anche durante le ore di punta. Questo sei tuEsperienza professionale: porti una solida esperienza nel settore della gastronomia, idealmente da un ambiente alberghiero a 4 o 5 stelle. Interesse per le arti culinarie: ti piace maneggiare ingredienti freschi e sei felice di supportare il team nella preparazione del cibo. Competenze linguistiche: comunichi con sicurezza in tedesco, inglese o italiano. Personalità: sei caratterizzato da flessibilità e capacità di lavorare bene in squadra. Apprezzi un ambiente dinamico e ti piace lavorare all'interno di un team motivato. Vantaggi Nel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Impiegato d'ufficio - Steward (inizia immediatamente) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno dando forma al Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti lusso intelligente per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tali, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione ed esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura di modellamento: questo è ciò che ti muovi con noiPulizia e organizzazione: garantirai pulizia e ordine impeccabili nella nostra cucina di fascia alta e nel back office del ristorante. Gestione attenta: sarai responsabile della manipolazione, pulizia e conservazione precise di porcellana, argenteria, vetreria e ferramenta. Coordinamento e organizzazione: garantisci operazioni senza intoppi attraverso un'organizzazione e un coordinamento efficienti delle attività quotidiane. Inizio: immediato Questo sei tuEsperienza di ospitalità: porti una solida esperienza dal settore dell'ospitalità, idealmente in un ambiente molto richiesto. Competenze linguistiche: tedesco o inglese o italiano Flessibilità e spirito di squadra: la tua capacità di adattarti alle mutevoli esigenze e di lavorare in modo efficace all'interno di un team dinamico è un punto di forza fondamentale. Inizio: desiderato immediatamente, fino a ca. 06.04. Vantaggi Nel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Tappezziere (m/l/d) Kulm Hotel 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno dando forma al Luxury Mountain Travel. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tali, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione ed esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura dello shaping: questo è ciò che muovi con noi Estetica e preservazione del valore: manutenzione e riparazioni professionali in tutto l'hotel, dai mobili imbottiti ai rivestimenti murali Attenzione per i dettagli: creazione e gestione di elenchi di difetti e segnalazione proattiva dei danni Coordinamento e comunicazione: acquisizione e negoziazione di preventivi e collaborazione con specialisti esterni Competenze tecniche: attenta manutenzione e gestione di macchine e strumenti Creazione dell'atmosfera: organizzazione e implementazione di eleganti decorazioni natalizie nel hotelEffettuare ordini ai fornitori insieme al responsabile tecnico Sei tu Idealmente, formazione completata come tappezziere, decoratore d'interni o qualifica simile Esperienza nella manutenzione e progettazione di interni di alta qualità Capacità di prendere decisioni indipendenti nella propria area di competenza e gestire le emergenze in modo professionale Competenze linguistiche: indispensabili: italiano, più tedesco o inglese Responsabile, orientato alle soluzioni e appassionato dell'interior design eleganteInizio: previo accordo VantaggiIn Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. descriptionByLocale.de: Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100 %. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 01.06.2026. ## Das bewegen Sie mit uns. Sie schätzen glasklare Prozesse, einwandfreie Hygiene und Teamarbeit auf 5-Sterne-Superior-Niveau? Werden Sie zur treibenden Kraft hinter unseren kulinarischen Erlebnissen und sorgen Sie für einen reibungslosen Ablauf im Back-of-House. Ihre Aufgaben: Schicht- und Dienstplanung für mehrere Filialen (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Zimmerservice, Bankette, externe Veranstaltungen) – Sie orchestrieren nahtlose Abläufe von der Inszenierung bis zur Panne. Führung & Coaching des Stewarding-Teams: tägliche Briefings, klare Standards, motivierende Präsenz – und wenn der Druck groß ist, führen Sie durch praktische Arbeit. Hygiene & Qualitätssicherung auf höchstem Niveau (HACCP-konform): Kontrollen, Dokumentation und Schulung zur Gewährleistung einwandfreier Standards. Geschirrspül- und Gerätemanagement: Effiziente Nutzung moderner Einrichtungen, Pflege und Wartung als zentrale Verbindung zwischen Küche, Service und Veranstaltungen. Bestands- und Kostenkontrolle: Den Überblick über Lagerbestände, Chemikalien und Verbrauchsmaterialien behalten; Gewährleistung effizienter Prozesse ohne Ausfallzeiten. Event Excellence: Logistik für Großveranstaltungen, Einrichtung von Rückgabestationen und Verwaltung schneller Abwicklungen. ## Das ist Ihre Erfahrung im Luxus-Gastgewerbe/Catering im Stewarding oder Back-of-House – idealerweise in einer leitenden oder stellvertretenden Führungsposition. Praxisorientierte Denkweise und Überblick: Du triffst kluge Entscheidungen, behältst in Spitzenzeiten die Ruhe und übernimmst die Verantwortung. Führungs- und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. Hands-on-Mentalität: proaktiv, lösungsorientiert und ein Vorbild für Sauberkeit, Ordnung und Effizienz. Solide Kenntnisse in Hygiene und Technik: HACCP-Fachwissen, Vertrautheit mit Reinigungstechnik und Sicherheit im Umgang mit Planungs-/Bürotools. Flexibilität: Bereitschaft zu Schicht-, Wochenend- und Support-Events – Sie genießen den Puls einer lebendigen Luxusimmobilie. Sprachen: Portugiesisch oder Italienisch sowie Englisch. ## Vorteile Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen. Jetzt bewerben ## Büroangestellter - Steward (ab sofort) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100 % Menschen auf 1800 m Seehöhe prägen das Luxus-Bergreisen. Unsere dynamische und internationale Community bietet unseren Gästen smarten Luxus für ein unnachahmliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels zu unserem Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt zutiefst inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und als solche leben wir unsere Kultur: dezenten Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam machen wir es möglich. Das ist Ihre Chance, Teil unserer Gestaltungskultur zu werden: Das bewegen Sie mit unsWir suchen tatkräftige Unterstützung für unser modernes Mitarbeiterrestaurant Capricorn, das vor knapp einem Jahr neu gebaut wurde. Du bist das Herzstück unserer Abläufe hinter den Kulissen und sorgst nicht nur für einwandfreie Sauberkeit, sondern unterstützt auch aktiv unser Küchenteam bei den kulinarischen Zubereitungen. Deine Aufgaben: Küchenunterstützung: Du hilfst aktiv bei Vorbereitungsarbeiten (mise-en-place), wie dem fachgerechten Schneiden von Gemüse und anderen Vorbereitungsarbeiten. Ordnung und Sauberkeit: Du sorgst für einwandfreie Sauberkeit und Organisation in unserer modernen Küche sowie im Backoffice des Restaurants Capricorn. Sorgfältiger Umgang: Du bist verantwortlich für die Präzise Reinigung, Pflege und Lagerung von Porzellan, Glaswaren, Besteck und Küchenutensilien (Töpfe und Pfannen). Koordination und Organisation: Sie arbeiten eng mit den Küchen- und Serviceteams zusammen, um einen reibungslosen Betrieb zu gewährleisten – auch während der Stoßzeiten. Das sind SieBerufserfahrung: Sie bringen fundierte Erfahrung aus der Gastronomie mit, idealerweise aus einem 4- oder 5-Sterne-Hotelumfeld.Interesse an Kochkunst: Sie haben Freude am Umgang mit frischen Zutaten und unterstützen das Team gerne bei der Essenszubereitung.Sprachkenntnisse: Sie kommunizieren sicher auf Deutsch, Englisch oder Italienisch.Persönlichkeit: Sie zeichnen sich durch Flexibilität und Teamfähigkeit aus. Sie schätzen ein dynamisches Umfeld und arbeiten gerne in einem motivierten Team. VorteileBei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen. ## Büroangestellter - Steward (ab sofort) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100 % Menschen auf 1800 m Seehöhe prägen das Luxus-Bergreisen. descriptionByLocale.fr: Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadine, Grisons). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Saisonnier. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. ## C'est ce que vous faites chez nous Vous vous épanouissez grâce à des processus clairs, une hygiène irréprochable et un travail d'équipe à un niveau supérieur 5 étoiles ? Devenez le moteur de nos expériences culinaires et assurez un fonctionnement sans faille en back-of-house. Vos responsabilités : Planification des quarts de travail et des tâches dans plusieurs points de vente (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, événements externes) - vous orchestrez des opérations transparentes, de la mise en place à la panne. Leadership et coaching de l'équipe de stewarding : briefings quotidiens, normes claires, présence motivante - et lorsque la pression est forte, vous dirigez en travaillant sur le terrain. Hygiène & Assurance Qualité au plus haut niveau (conforme HACCP) : inspections, documentation et formation pour garantir des normes irréprochables. Vaisselle et gestion des équipements : utilisation efficace des installations modernes, entretien et maintenance, agissant comme un lien clé entre la cuisine, le service et les événements. Inventaire et contrôle des coûts : suivi des stocks, des produits chimiques et des consommables ; garantissant des processus efficaces sans temps d’arrêt. Excellence événementielle : logistique pour les événements à grande échelle, mise en place des stations de retour et gestion des délais d'exécution rapides. ## Il s'agit de votre expérience dans l'hôtellerie/restauration de luxe au sein d'un service de intendance ou d'arrière-maison - idéalement dans un rôle de supervision ou d'assistant de direction. Esprit pratique et vue d'ensemble : vous prenez des décisions intelligentes, restez calme aux heures de pointe et vous vous appropriez. Compétences en leadership et en communication. Mentalité pratique : proactif, orienté vers les solutions et un modèle en matière de propreté, d'ordre et d'efficacité. Solides connaissances en hygiène et en technologie : expertise HACCP, familiarité avec la technologie de nettoyage et confiance dans les outils de planification/de bureau. Flexibilité : volonté de travailler par quarts, le week-end et de soutenir des événements – vous appréciez le pouls d'une propriété de luxe animée. Langues : portugais ou italien ainsi que l'anglais. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre réussite. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. Postulez maintenant ## Office Employee - Steward (commencer immédiatement) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les gens à 1800 m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale propose à nos clients un Luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de façonnage : c'est ce que vous faites avec nous. Nous recherchons un soutien énergique pour notre restaurant d'entreprise moderne, Capricorn, qui a été nouvellement construit il y a un peu moins d'un an. Vous êtes au cœur de nos opérations en coulisses, assurant non seulement une propreté irréprochable, mais soutenant également activement notre équipe de cuisine dans les préparations culinaires.Vos tâches :Soutien en cuisine : Vous participez activement aux travaux de préparation (mise en place), tels que la découpe professionnelle des légumes et autres tâches préparatoires.Ordre et propreté : Vous assurez une propreté et une organisation sans faille dans notre cuisine moderne ainsi que dans le back-office du restaurant Capricorn.Manipulation soigneuse : Vous êtes responsable du nettoyage précis, entretien et stockage de la vaisselle, de la verrerie, des couverts et des ustensiles de cuisine (casseroles et poêles).Coordination et organisation : Vous travaillez en étroite collaboration avec les équipes de cuisine et de service pour assurer le bon fonctionnement, même pendant les heures de pointe. C'est vousExpérience professionnelle : Vous apportez une solide expérience dans le secteur de la gastronomie, idéalement issue d'un environnement hôtelier 4 ou 5 étoiles.Intérêt pour les arts culinaires : Vous aimez manipuler des ingrédients frais et êtes heureux de soutenir l'équipe dans la préparation des repas.Compétences linguistiques : Vous communiquez avec assurance en allemand, anglais ou italien.Personnalité : Vous vous caractérisez par votre flexibilité et votre capacité à bien travailler en équipe. Vous appréciez un environnement dynamique et aimez travailler au sein d’une équipe motivée. AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Employé de bureau - Steward (commencer immédiatement) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les gens à 1800 m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Propreté et organisation : Vous assurerez une propreté et un ordre impeccables dans notre cuisine haut de gamme et dans le back-office du restaurant. Manipulation soignée : Vous serez responsable de la manipulation, du nettoyage et du stockage précis de la porcelaine, de l'argenterie, de la verrerie et de la vaisselle noire. Coordination et organisation : Assurez le bon déroulement des opérations grâce à une organisation et une coordination efficaces des tâches quotidiennes. Souci du détail : création et gestion de listes de défauts ainsi que signalement proactif des dommages. Coordination et communication : obtention et négociation de devis et collaboration avec des spécialistes externes. Compétences techniques : entretien et manipulation soigneux des machines et des outils. Commandes auprès des fournisseurs en collaboration avec le responsable technique Il s'agit de vous Idéalement, avez suivi une formation de tapissier, de décorateur d'intérieur ou une qualification similaire Expérience dans l'entretien et la conception d'intérieurs de haute qualité Capacité à prendre des décisions indépendantes dans votre domaine d'expertise et à gérer les urgences de manière professionnelle Compétences linguistiques : indispensable : italien, plus allemand ou anglais Responsable, orienté vers les solutions et passionné par la décoration intérieure élégante Début : sur accord AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. jobs.title: Training & Development Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Training & Development Manager (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
In this role, you are the driving force behind the personal and professional development of our teams:Strategic L&D Design: You design the annual training master plan. From onboarding and Service Excellence to resilience and digitalization.
Leadership Partner for CREATE: Working closely with our HR Director, you will anchor our leadership principles within our group of approximately 40 managers. You will facilitate Leader Circles and design workshops that actively shape our corporate culture.
Quality & Impact: You don’t settle for "completed." You develop methods to measure the transfer of knowledge into daily operations (eNPS, Pulse Checks) and manage our L&D KPIs with foresight.
Learning Culture & Innovation: You will build a modern framework of coaching, mentoring, and feedback, integrating digital learning tools and HR dashboards for data-driven development.
Excellence through Cooperation: You coordinate collaborations with top-tier partners such as the Swiss Leadership Academy or HSG (University of St. Gallen), purposefully bringing external expertise into the hotels.

## This is you
Expertise: You have several years of experience in L&D or training, ideally within luxury hospitality or a comparable premium service environment.
Methodology: You are a pro at designing and delivering training programs and have experience with cultural transformation and leadership initiatives.
Personality: You are a gifted moderator with high intercultural sensitivity. A hands-on mentality combined with strategic thinking is second nature to you.
Value Ambassador: For you, terms like Generosity, Passion, and Imagination are not just buzzwords, but the foundation of your daily work.
Language Skills: Proficiency in both German and English (ideally also Italian) is mandatory to effectively reach and inspire our international teams.
Why join us:We offer you the creative freedom to shape a modern learning culture in two of the most renowned hotels in the Alps. Here, you will work where others vacation—in an environment defined by mutual appreciation and a relentless pursuit of excellence.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours.
This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usCreating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.
This is youHolder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.
